CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-03-2015 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-23-2015 Continued To Apr-22-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER
Off Calendar Feb-23-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. JOSEPH B. HERSHENSON of CapKey Advisors, APC, Tel No. (415) 742-0679 appearing for Defendants;
No other appearances made in this matter.

RULING - Defense counsel informed the Court that parties have reached a settlement in this case. The Court received an e-mail from Plaintiff's counsel Robert H. Dewberry requesting that this motion be taken off-calendar. The Court vacated its tentative ruling, and ordered as follows: PLAINTIFF GLOBAL STAFFING SERVICES, LLC'S APPLICATION FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER is taken off-calendar at the request of parties per the indicated settlement of this case. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Ann Delgado, CSR #11185 (302/EHG)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-23-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. JOSEPH B. HERSHENSON of CapKey Advisors, APC, Tel No. (415) 742-0679 appearing for Defendants;
No other appearances made in this matter.

RULING - Defense counsel informed the Court that parties have reached a settlement in this case. The Court received an e-mail from Plaintiff's counsel Robert H. Dewberry requesting that this motion be taken off-calendar. The Court vacated its tentative ruling, and ordered as follows: DEFENDANTS JACKNYFE, INC. D/B/A/ ECHO, KHRISTOPHER LOUX, CHRIS SAAD, AND LEV WALKIN'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is taken off-calendar at the request of parties per the indicated settlement of this case. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Ann Delgado, CSR #11185 (302/EHG)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-10-2015 Continued To Feb-23-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS JACKNYFE, INC D/B/A/ ECHO, KHRISTOPHER LOUX, CHRIS SAAD, AND LEV WALKIN'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is continued on the Court's motion to February 23, 2015. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/EHG)

APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER
Off Calendar Feb-10-2015 Continued To Feb-23-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF GLOBAL STAFFING SERVICES, LLC'S APPLICATION FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER is continued on the Court's motion to February 23, 2015. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/EHG)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-22-2015 Continued To Feb-10-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS JACKNYFE, INC. DBA ECHO, KHRISTOPHER LOUX, CHRIS SAAD, AND LEV WALKIN'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is continued to February 10, 2015, to give the moving party a chance to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. The moving party shall immediately provide a courtesy copy of the demurrer with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. The court has the other papers. Judge: A. James Robertson, II, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/AJR)

APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER
Off Calendar Jan-22-2015 Continued To Feb-10-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF GLOBAL STAFFING SERVICES, LLC'S APPLICATION FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER is continued to February 10, 2015, to give the moving party a chance to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. The moving party shall immediately provide a courtesy copy of the demurrer with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. The court has the other papers. Judge: A. James Robertson, II, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/AJR)
